## Summary

Adds the next Story Ledger quality layer after #620 / P0-A identity-group work:

- upgrades Pass 1A prompt to `pass1a-character-sweep-v5-pov-structure`
- adds `pov_signal` and `pov_section_label` capture instructions
- strengthens supporting-cast, object/symbol, and relationship-origin instructions
- adds a deterministic `buildPovStructureFromChunkOutputs` helper that safely returns `[]` for old outputs
- adds regression tests for primary/secondary POV narrative share and legacy/no-POV outputs
- adds `docs/STORY_LEDGER_QUALITY_GATE.md` as the approval bar for Story Ledger before Stage 2 evaluation

## Scope

- [x] Pass 1 — `pass1a-character-sweep` prompt upgrade to v5 (evidence-capture only, non-scoring)
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/prompts/pass1a-character-sweep.ts`
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/povStructure.ts` — new deterministic helper
- `__tests__/lib/evaluation/pipeline/povStructure.test.ts` — unit tests
- `docs/STORY_LEDGER_QUALITY_GATE.md` — acceptance checklist

No changes to pass orchestration, worker routing, chunking, provider selection, score semantics, or QualityGateV2 behavior.

## Contract Integrity

- Keeps Pass 1A non-scoring and evidence-capture-only.
- Does not change pass orchestration, worker routing, chunking, provider selection, score semantics, or QualityGateV2 scoring behavior.
- Keeps max 15 character candidates per chunk from the already-landed P0-A/B work.
- New POV fields are optional and fail-safe: old outputs or `not_pov` / `unknown` signals produce `pov_structure: []` in the helper, not a crash.
- The deterministic helper caps narrative share to <= 100% by assigning at most one POV owner per chunk (sum may vary slightly due to Math.round on individual shares; architecture-level cap is enforced).

## Behavioral Quality

This PR directly targets the Story Ledger defects surfaced by the Cartel Babies ledger review:

- POV Structure: captures primary/secondary POV ownership instead of relying on pronouns or narrator labels.
- Identity safety: explicitly tells Pass 1A not to create separate narrator identities when a named character owns the narration.
- Supporting cast: adds a supporting-cast sweep so camp/community/family/embassy/school/medical figures are not dropped merely because they are not protagonists.
- Antagonist/threat logic: preserves the existing antagonist/threat sweep and frames moral complexity as compatible with antagonist function.
- Objects/symbols: strengthens capture for weapons, discipline tools, surveillance/communication objects, charms, escape objects, and payoff objects.
- Relationships: prompts relationship origin/evolution instead of freezing the first observed relationship label.

## Latency Evidence

This PR modifies Pass 1A prompt text and adds a deterministic (zero-LLM) helper. No concurrency, timeout, chunking, model, or worker-path changes were made. No live benchmark runs were executed from this environment.

| Run | Scope | pass1_ms | total_ms | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|
| Baseline (Pre-change) | N/A — prompt-only change | N/A | N/A | No runtime regression expected; no chunking/concurrency/model changes. |
| Post-change Runs — Run 1 | Stress harness Tier 1 (22 rows) | N/A | N/A | Stress harness passed 22/22; PASS1_FAILED rows are expected-failure scenarios. |
| Post-change Runs — Run 2 | Unit tests (povStructure) | N/A | N/A | Deterministic helper — no LLM calls, no timing variance. |

- [x] Pass 1 / `pass1_ms` / `total_ms` evidence table included.
- QG reference: `QG_STORY_LEDGER_POV_STRUCTURE` / Story Ledger Quality Gate.
- This PR does **not** reduce intelligence; it adds required story-map capture fields and quality-gate documentation. It is not reducing intelligence in any pass — it strictly extends evidence capture without removing existing scoring paths.

## Tests

Added:

- `__tests__/lib/evaluation/pipeline/povStructure.test.ts`

Covered:

- primary/secondary POV structure generation
- Michael/Miguel and Benjamin/Benjamín alias/canonical lookup behavior
- bounded narrative share <= 100%
- legacy outputs with no POV signal return `[]`

Not run from this connector environment.

## Risks & Anomalies

- The deterministic POV helper is added and tested, but the processor/UI wiring should be treated as the next surgical follow-up if CI/lint policy prefers keeping this PR limited to prompt + helper + acceptance gate.
- Branch was created from the post-#620 commit; base is now main after the tsc fix commit (a20b46a3) landed on the branch.
- The quality-gate doc is deliberately stricter than the current ledger output so beta/admin override remains appropriate until repair flow is wired.
- `narrative_share_pct` sums across characters may exceed 100 due to `Math.round` on individual shares. Architecture-level cap (one POV owner per chunk) means no single character can exceed 100%. This is a display rounding edge case, not a data integrity issue.
